title: Claim SPOT
subtitle: Choose how to claim your proof: QR, link, code, geolocation, or NFC depending on the event context.
connectSubtitle: You need to connect your wallet to claim a SPOT.
connectRequired: You need to connect your wallet first to claim your SPOT.

methods.qrDesc: Scan the event QR code to claim your SPOT instantly.
methods.linkDesc: Enter the event's unique link to claim remotely.
methods.codeDesc: Enter the code shared by the event organizer.
methods.geolocationDesc: Verify your location near the event to validate attendance.
methods.nfcDesc: Bring your device close to the NFC tag for a tactile experience.

actions.verifyLocationDesc: Make sure you're at the event location. We'll use your location to validate attendance.
actions.nfcAction: Bring your device close to the NFC tag
actions.nfcActionDesc: Make sure NFC is enabled on your device and bring it close to the claim point.

notifications.walletRequiredMsg: Connect your wallet before claiming the collectible
notifications.eventNotFound: Event not found on the network
notifications.eventNotFoundMsg: That event does not exist in the contract (ID may be from another environment or created in test mode). Create the event again with the real backend and use the new link/code.
notifications.claimSentMsg: Tx sent. Copy the detail if you need to share it.
notifications.invalidLinkMsg: Could not find an event ID in the link
notifications.invalidCodeMsg: Include the numeric event ID in the shared code
notifications.qrComingSoonMsg: QR scanning will send the automatic claim to the backend.
notifications.noGeolocationMsg: Your browser does not support geolocation
notifications.geoPendingMsg: Geolocation validation is not yet implemented.
notifications.invalidQRMsg: The scanned QR code does not contain a valid event link.

scanner.title: Scan QR
scanner.instruction: Point your camera at the event QR code
scanner.cameraErrorDesc: Check camera permissions in your browser.

tldr.summary: Choose how to claim your proof: QR, link, code, geolocation, or NFC depending on the event context.
tldr.bullet2Detail: Ideal for remote claims with pragmatic copy.
tldr.bullet3Detail: Visibility of future methods with transparency.
